no: Druids and Rangers can get an animal companion that gradually increases in power. Overwrites prior changes to Rod of Resurrection. Has two install bugs: DestroySelf(5) in UBRPET.d (WeiDU parse error — takes no args), and three ACTION_READLN prompts that block automated installs. Use eet-mod-forge-patches to fix both.
ic: Overwrites prior changes to Rod of Resurrection

ki.description: UBRPET.d line 106 calls DestroySelf(5) but DestroySelf takes no arguments.
ki.workaround: Apply eet-mod-forge-patches Animal Companions component, or manually edit AnimalCompanions/files3/UBRPET.d line 106: change DestroySelf(5) to DestroySelf().

ki.description: Setup-AnimalCompanions.tp2 uses three ACTION_READLN prompts (druid toggle, companion name, companion selection) that block automated installs (mod_installer, PI).
ki.workaround: Apply eet-mod-forge-patches Animal Companions component, or manually replace the READLN block with: OUTER_SET druid = 1 and OUTER_SPRINT name ~Ser Pounce~

sum: Gives ranger and druid animal companions that level up with you, similar to the NWN system. A permanent pet that fights alongside the party.

co.n: Animal Companions For All Rangers (Optional: Druids)
co.tp2n: Animal Companions For All Rangers (Optional: Druids)
co.no: Two known bugs: DestroySelf(5) parse error in UBRPET.d, and three ACTION_READLN prompts that block automated install. Apply eet-mod-forge-patches to fix both.

in.t: Uses ACTION_READLN for druid/companion selection — requires manual input or eet-mod-forge-patches for automated install.
